index.title: Umguquli Wezixhobo
index.description: Umguquli wezixhobo uvula izicelo zokutsala eziguqulelwe ngomatshini zeefayile zakho zezixhobo kuyo nayiphi na i-repo, nakweyiphi na ifomathi - inikwe amandla yi-Azure AI Translator.
index.socialTitle: Umguquli Wovimba - guqulela iifayili zoovimba ngokuzenzekelayo
index.badge: v3.0 - Node 24, repo config, glossary, dry run
index.lede: Umguquleli wezixhobo uvula izicelo zokutsala eziguqulelwe ngomatshini kwiifayile zakho zezixhobo usebenzisa i-Azure AI Translator nge-SDK esemthethweni - akukho nkonzo zongezelelweyo, nje ukuhamba komsebenzi.
index.workflowTitle: Ukuguqulelwa njengomsebenzi womsebenzi, hayi umsebenzi womsebenzi.
index.workflowBody: Lahla isenzo kwi-CI yakho esele ikho, uyikhombe kwi-Azure AI Translator, kwaye uvumele i-repo yakho ithethe zonke iilwimi ozijolise kuzo.

formats.title: Iifomathi zefayile ezintandathu
formats.body: Uhambo olujikelezayo {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, kunye ne-{restext} kunye nefomathi ezinzileyo ye-byte.

config.title: Ukumiselwa kwenkqubo yenqanaba le-Repo
config.body: Lahla ifayile {configPath} ukuze uquke i-globs, i-glossary, kunye neendidi zabaGuquli Besiko.

glossary.title: I-Glossary-aware
glossary.body: Tshixa amagama e-brand kunye nemigaqo yemveliso nge-regex yegama elikrelekrele eliphatha i-{cpp}, {dotnet}, kunye nabahlobo.

dryRun.title: I-Dry-run + i-soft-fail
dryRun.body: Jonga iinguqulelo ngaphandle kokubhala iifayile, okanye ubonise yonke impazamo njengesilumkiso ngelixa uphinda.

outputs.title: Iziphumo ze-PR-friendly
outputs.body: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, kunye ne-{hasNewTranslations} slot ngokuthe ngqo kwi-create-pull-request.

sdk.title: I-SDK esemthethweni ye-Azure
sdk.body: Yakhelwe kwi-{azureSdk} + {corePipeline} - ukuzama ngokuzenzekelayo kwi-{statusCodes}, akukho HTTP eqengqelekayo ngesandla. {esbuild}-bundled, audit-clean.

workflowPreview.body: Iimfihlelo ezintathu, imigca emine, kwaye i-repo yakho ithetha iilwimi ezininzi kwi-push elandelayo.

cta.title: Ngaba ulungele ukungena kwi-autopilot?
cta.body: Isitshixo esinye se-Azure AI Translator, ifayile enye yokuhamba komsebenzi. Umguquli wezibonelelo uphatha okuseleyo.

getting-started.title: Ukuqala
getting-started.lede: Yongeza ifayile yokuhamba komsebenzi, ikhombe kwiziqinisekiso zakho ze-Azure AI Translator, kwaye isenzo siya kuskena i-repo yeefayile zemithombo yolwimi lomthombo kwaye ikhuphe abantakwabo abaguqulelweyo.

provision.title: Ukubonelela ngesibonelelo se-Azure AI Translator
provision.body: Yenza umthombo we-Azure AI Translator kwi-portal ye-Azure, uze ugcine oku kulandelayo njengeemfihlo zokugcina i-GitHub ukuze ukuhamba komsebenzi kukwazi ukuzifunda:

resource.title: Yenza ifayili yovimba womthombo
resource.body: Iifayile zemithombo zisebenzisa ingqungquthela ye-{namingConvention}. Umzekelo, {sourceFile} iba {frFile}, {deFile}, njalo njalo emva kokubaleka.

output.title: Hlola isiphumo
output.body: Nje ukuba ukuhamba komsebenzi kugqityiwe, isenzo siveza iziphumo ezintathu onokuzifaka kwinkcazo ye-PR: {summaryTitle}, {summaryDetails}, kunye ne-{hasNewTranslations}. Ikwabhala isishwankathelo seMarkdown kwiphepha lomsebenzi nge-{coreSummary}.

nextSteps.title: Amanyathelo alandelayo
nextSteps.recipes: Jonga iiresiphi ze-monorepos, ii-glossaries zesiko, kunye neendidi zoMguquleli wesiko.

configuration.title: Ukuqwalaselwa kwenkqubo
configuration.lede: Bonisa ukungagqibeki kube kanye kwifayile yoqwalaselo lwendawo yokugcina kwaye uvumele wonke umsebenzi ukuba ufumane ilifa. Igalelo lezenzo lihlala liphumelela xa zombini zinikezelwa.
configuration.intro: Gqithisa indlela ngegalelo {configPath} ukuba ufuna indawo engagqibekanga.

fields.sourceLocale: Buyela kwigalelo {sourceLocale} ukuba ayimiselwanga. Kwakhona ithunyelwe kuMguquleli njengoko {fromLocale} imitya emifutshane ayifumaneki ngokuzenzekelayo.
fields.toLocales: Nokuba luluhlu okanye umtya owahlulwe ngekoma.
fields.includeExclude: Iipateni zeGlob ezivavanywa ngokuchasene neendlela ezipheleleyo kunye neendlela ezinxulumene nomsebenzi.
fields.glossary: Ixesha lokuguqulela emva kokuguqulela. Ulwazi lomda wegama (izibambo {cpp}, {dotnet}).
fields.categoryId: Udidi lwe-Azure {customTranslatorLink} - ishishini lakho / i-domain knob (ezomthetho, ezonyango, ithoni yokuthengisa, njl.). Ithunyelwe njenge {categoryQuery}.
fields.textType: Ukungaphumeleli {plain}. Sebenzisa {html} kuphela ukuba amaxabiso akho ezibonelelo aqulathe iziqwenga zokwenene ze HTML.
fields.profanityAction: Indlela yokujongana namagama ahlambulukileyo kwimveliso yokuguqulela?
fields.allowFallback: Cwangcisa kwi-{false} ukuze ungaphumeleli uguqulelo xa {categoryId} yakho ingenakho ukuthunyelwa kwendawo ekujoliswe kuyo endaweni yokubuyela kwimodeli ngokubanzi.
fields.maxRetries: Ubuninzi beenzame zokuphinda zizame iimpendulo ze-HTTP zexeshana ({statusCodes}). Ukungaphumeleli {defaultRetries}. Iifowuni ezipheleleyo ze-HTTP ngesicelo ngasinye {totalCalls}.
fields.retryBackoffMs: Cap (ms) nakweyiphi na i-backoff yokulala. Ukungaphumeleli {defaultBackoff}. I-Azure's {retryAfter} header ihlonitshwa kanye xa ikhona; Ngaphandle koko, i-jittered exponential backoff isetyenziswa, efakwe kweli xabiso.
fields.protectPlaceholders: Ukungaphumeleli {true}. Xa ivuliwe, iithokheni ezinje nge-{mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} kunye ne-HTML zithathelwa indawo ngamathokheni e-sentinel ngaphambi kokuguqulelwa kwaye zibuyiselwe emva koko. Yenza ingasebenzi kuphela xa umthombo uqulethe ngabom iziqulathi ezimile okwendawo.
fields.customPlaceholderPatterns: Iipateni ezongezelelweyo ze-regex (ngaphandle kwemida) zongezwa kwiseti yendawo engagqibekanga, umz. {angleToken} ye-syntax yethokheni yesiko. Ii-regexes ezingaqinisekiswanga azihoywa.
fields.noTranslatePatterns: Iipateni ze-Glob ezihambelana namaqhosha okwinqanaba lwe-parser (indlela yamachaphaza e-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, iqhosha le-INI/restext). Izitshixo ezihambelanayo ziyasuswa kwisicelo kwaye zidlule ngexabiso lazo lomthombo ligciniwe.

steps.actionInputs: Isenzo sifunda amagalelo acacileyo avela kumsebenzi womsebenzi.
steps.precedence: Kwintsimi nganye ekwabelwana ngayo, igalelo liyaphumelela; Ngaphandle koko, ixabiso le-YAML lisetyenziswa.
steps.validation: Amaxabiso adityanisiweyo aqinisekisiwe. I-enums engasebenziyo (umz. {invalidEnum}) yenza isenzo singaphumeleli ngokukhawuleza ngomyalezo ocacileyo.

tone.heading: Ithoni kunye neShishini, ngokucacileyo
tone.body: I-Azure AI Translator v3 API ayinayo iqhosha elinye leethoni. Izicwangciso ezimbini zidibeneyo ukukunika uninzi lolawulo olufanayo:
tone.industryBody: Sebenzisa {categoryId} ukukhomba kudidi lwe-Azure {customTranslatorLink} oluqeqeshwe kwi-corpus yakho - ezomthetho, ubuchwephesha, ezonyango, ukuthengisa, okanye nantoni na enye. Le yeyona lever inamandla kwithoni, ilizwi lophawu, kunye nesigama.
tone.surfaceBody: Sebenzisa i-{glossaryLink} ukutshixa amagama e-brand kunye nemigaqo yemveliso verbatim, kwaye usebenzise i-{profanityAction} ukucoca amagama angcolileyo xa ujolise ekuhlaleni kwabaphulaphuli abancinci.

inputs.title: Igalelo kunye neziphumo
inputs.lede: Igalelo ngalinye lamkelwe kwifayile yokuzikhethela ye-repo config. Xa zombini zibekiwe, igalelo lesenzo liphumelele.
inputs.configurationIntro: Jonga i-{configurationLink} ye-schema ye-YAML kunye nomyalelo wokulayisha.

items.sourceLocale: Umthombo wendawo (umz. {en}) esetyenziselwa ukufumana iifayili zoovimba ezifana {sourceGlob}. Kwakhona wathumela umguquleli njengoko {fromLocale}.
items.subscriptionKey: Azure AI Translator subscription key. Dlula nge-{secrets}.

items.toLocales: Iindawo zokuguqulela. Yamkela uluhlu lweJSON ({jsonArray}) okanye amaxabiso ahlukaniswe ngekoma.
items.include: Iipateni ze-glob ezahlulwe ngumgca omtsha; Kuphela ziifayile ezihambelanayo eziguqulelwayo.
items.exclude: Iipateni ze-glob ezahlulwe ngumgca omtsha; Iifayile ezihambelanayo ziyatsiba (zisetyenziswe emva kokuquka).
items.configPath: Indlela eya kwifayili yokumiselwa kwenkqubo yekhompyutha ye-YAML (enxulumene nengcambu yomsebenzi wokusebenzela).
items.dryRun: Xa {true}, qhuba iinguqulelo kwaye ukhuphe izishwankathelo kodwa ungabhali iifayile.
items.failOnError: Xa {true}, iimpazamo ezingalindelekanga ziyasilela isenzo; Xa {false}, iimpazamo zizilumkiso.

translatorInputs.heading: Faka isicelo soguquli amagalelo
translatorInputs.intro: Ezi mephu ngqo kwi-Azure AI Translator v3 iiparameter zombuzo. Wonke umntu uyazikhethela; Ukungaphumeleli komguquli kusebenza xa kungasetywanga.
translatorInputs.caption: Faka isicelo soguquli amagalelo

items.categoryId: Udidi lwe-Azure {customTranslatorLink} — i-industry/domain/tone knob. Ithunyelwe njenge {categoryQuery}.
items.textType: {plain} okanye {html}. Sebenzisa {html} kuphela xa amaxabiso akho ezixhobo ziziqwenga zokwenene ze HTML.
items.profanityAction: {noAction}, {marked}, okanye {deleted}. Lawula indlela amagama angcolileyo akhutshwa ngayo kwiinguqulelo.
items.allowFallback: Xa {false}, Umguquleli ubuyisela imposiso endaweni yokubuyela kwindlela eqhelekileyo ukuba {categoryId} yakho ayinakho ukuthunyelwa kwendawo ekujoliswe kuyo.

resilienceInputs.heading: Ukomelela kunye nokukhuselwa kwendawo
resilienceInputs.intro: La magalelo alawula indlela isenzo esiziphatha ngayo xa uMguquleli enciphisa isicelo sakho kunye nendlela ekhusela ngayo iithokheni zendawo ezinje nge-{mustache} okanye {indexZero} ekuphazamiseni ngexesha lokuguqulela.
resilienceInputs.caption: Ukomelela kunye negalelo lokukhusela indawo

items.maxRetries: Ubuninzi beenzame zokuphinda zizame iimpendulo ze-HTTP zexeshana ({statusCodes}). Inani elipheleleyo leefowuni ze-HTTP ngesicelo ngasinye {totalCalls}.
items.retryBackoffMs: Cap (kwi-milliseconds) kuyo nayiphi na i-backoff yokulala. Isenzo sihlonipha intloko yempendulo ye-Azure {retryAfter} ngokuchanekileyo xa ikhona; Ngaphandle koko, isebenzisa i-jittered exponential backoff efakwe kweli xabiso.
items.protectPlaceholders: Xa {true} (okungagqibekanga), ii-placeholders ezinje nge-{mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} kunye ne-HTML zithathelwa indawo ngamathokheni e-sentinel ngaphambi kokuguqulelwa kwaye zibuyiselwe emva koko. Khubaza kuphela xa umthombo wakho uqulethe ngabom isicatshulwa esimile okwendawo ekufuneka siguqulelwe.
items.customPlaceholderPatterns: Ii-regexes ezahlulwe ngumgca omtsha (ngaphandle kwemida) zongezwa kwiseti yendawo engagqibekanga, umz. {angleToken} ye-syntax yethokheni yesiko.
items.noTranslatePatterns: Iipateni ze-glob ezahlulwe ngumgca omtsha ezihambelana nezitshixo zenqanaba le-parser (indlela yamachaphaza ye-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, i-INI / isitshixo se-restext). Amaqhosha angqamanayo alahliwe kwisicelo soMguquleli aze adlule ngexabiso lawo lomthombo agcinwe.

items.summaryDetails: Isishwankathelo se-Markdown esifanelekileyo kumzimba we-PR okanye isishwankathelo somsebenzi.
items.hasNewTranslations: {trueString} xa kuveliswa inguqulelo enye okanye ezingaphezulu ezintsha.

formats.title: Iifomathi zefayile
formats.lede: Iifomathi ezintandathu zezixhobo ezijikelezayo. Isenzo sifunda ifayile nganye yomthombo-wendawo, siguqulela amaxabiso, kwaye sibhala umntakwabo kwindawo ekujoliswe kuyo.
formats.namingConvention: Zonke iifayile zisebenzisa isivumelwano {namingConvention} sokubiza amagama.

resx.blurb: Iifayile zemithombo ye-.NET esekwe kwi-XML. Ukuguqulela isicatshulwa sangaphakathi kwi-node nganye ye-{dataValue}, ukugcina izimvo kunye nemethadatha.

xliff.blurb: Amaxwebhu e-OASIS XLIFF 2.0. Iguqulela {source} ngalinye kwaye ibhale isiphumo kwi-{target} ehambelanayo, ibeka {trgLang} yendawo.

po.blurb: Iifayile ze-GNU gettext Into ephathekayo. Iguqulela {msgid} / {msgidPlural} nganye kwiifom {msgstr} / {msgstrPlural}.

json.blurb: Iifayile zeJSON ezingaqhelekanga. Izinto ezibekiweyo zifakwe kwi-{delimiter} delimiter yokuguqulela, emva koko ziphinde zifakwe kwimveliso. Izitshixo ezinamachaphaza ({dottedKey}) zigcinwa ngegama elithethiweyo.

ini.blurb: Iifayile ezilula ze-{keyValue} (i-Win32-style INI okanye nayiphi na i-config ethe tyaba). Izihloko zecandelo kunye nezimvo zigcinwa.

restext.blurb: Izibonelelo zokubhaliweyo zeMicrosoft MUI - izibini ezithe tyaba {keyValue} ezisetyenziswa njengeqabane lokubhaliweyo {resx}.

roundTrip.heading: Iziqinisekiso zohambo olujikelezayo
roundTrip.body: I-suite yovavanyo iqinisekisa i-byte-for-byte round-tripping yezixhobo ezimele zonke iifomathi. Ukuba ifomathi ye-quirk iphula ukujikeleza kwikhowudi yakho, nceda {issueLink} ngesampulu encinci.

recipes.title: Iindlela zokupheka
recipes.lede: Iipateni eziqhelekileyo zokuguqulela ngenqanawa: ii-monorepos, ii-glossaries, iindidi zesiko, ukubaleka okomileyo, kunye nolawulo lwethoni.

pullRequest.heading: Vula isicelo sokutsala emva kokuqhuba ngasinye

glossary.heading: I-Glossary yamagama e-brand kunye nemigaqo yemveliso
glossary.body: Amagama e-glossary asetyenziswa {after} uguqulelo, ke imveliso eguqulelwe ngomatshini igcina uphawu lwakho olukhethiweyo nokuba imodeli itshintshile kwi-synonym.

customCategory.heading: Udidi loMguquleli oLungiselelweyo (ushishino / indawo)
customCategory.body: Qeqesha udidi lwe-Azure {customTranslatorLink} kwi-corpus ebamba isigama sakho soshishino kunye nethoni (ezomthetho, ezonyango, ukuthengisa, ubunjineli bangaphakathi, njl.njl.) kwaye udlulise i-ID yayo nge-{categoryId}. Le yeyona toni inamandla kakhulu i-Azure inikezela.

tone.heading: Ulawulo lwethoni + ukubuyela umva okungqongqo
tone.body: Hlanganisa i-Custom Translator {categoryId} kunye ne-{profanityAction} kunye ne-{allowFallbackFalse} ukunyanzelisa ilizwi elingaguquguqukiyo kwaye usilele ukuhamba komsebenzi ukuba udidi olukhethiweyo alunakuthunyelwa kwenye yeendawo zakho ekujoliswe kuzo.

dryRun.heading: Sebenzisa okomileyo phambi kokuvula ukusebenza
dryRun.body: Isenzo sikhupha iziphumo zesishwankathelo kunye nesishwankathelo senyathelo, kodwa akukho fayile ibhaliweyo. Dibanisa kunye ne-{failOnErrorFalse} ukuveza yonke imiba njengesilumkiso ngelixa uphinda.

faq.title: Imibuzo Yarhoqo
faq.lede: Iimpendulo ezikhawulezayo kwimibuzo ephakama rhoqo xa uthatha isenzo.

azure.heading: Isenzo sithetha njani ne-Azure?
azure.body: Nge-{azureSdkLink} SDK esemthethweni yeMicrosoft, efakwe kwi-{corePipelineLink}. Oko kukunika ukuphinda uzame ngokuzenzekelayo kwi-{statusCodes}, isicelo esichwetheziweyo kunye neemodeli zokuphendula, kunye nokuphathwa kwentloko yokuqinisekiswa simahla - yonke into eyayikade iyifowuni ye-{axios} eqengqelekayo ngesandla. Indawo yesenzo sikawonke-wonke (amagalelo, iziphumo, iziphumo zefayile) ayitshintshanga.

tone.heading: Kutheni le nto ngamanye amaxesha iinguqulelo zingekho mthethweni okanye zingabonakali?
tone.body: Uguqulelo lomatshini aluphumelelanga kwimodeli yenjongo eqhelekileyo. Amaqhina amathathu anceda: i-{glossaryLink} yokugqithisa ixesha elinzima, i-{customTranslatorLink} yeemodeli ezilungelelanisiweyo eziqeqeshwe kwithoni yakho kunye nesigama, kunye {profanityAction} ukucoca okanye ukubeka iflegi yamagama angcolileyo.

duplicateFiles.heading: Ndingakuphepha njani ukuguqulela ifayile efanayo kabini?
duplicateFiles.body: Yenza ukuhamba komsebenzi kwi-{paths} ehambelana neefayile zakho zemvelaphi-locale kuphela, umz. {sourceGlob}. Isenzo sikwabandakanya isihluzi sayo sefayile nganye xa {githubToken} isetiwe, ukunciphisa umsebenzi kwiifayile kwi-commit yakutshanje.

offline.heading: Ndingayiqhuba le nto ngaphandle kweintanethi?
offline.body: Hayi ncam - i-Azure AI Translator yingqondo yexesha lokubaleka. Kodwa ungaqhuba kunye ne-{dryRunTrue} ukuqinisekisa ukuhlalutya kunye nokuqwalasela ngaphandle kokwenza naziphi na izicelo ze-HTTP zokuguqulela.

node.heading: Yeyiphi inguqulelo yeNode eqhutywa kuyo isenzo?
node.body: I-v3 isebenza kwi-GitHub Actions {nodeRuntime} ixesha lokubaleka. I-JavaScript ehlanganisiweyo iyahambelana neNode 20, 22, kunye ne-24, yile nto ivavanywa yi-CI.

dist.heading: Zivela phi ii-{distDir} ezihlanganisiweyo ezihlanganisiweyo?
dist.body: Izenzo zeGitHub JS zithumela i-JS yazo ehlanganisiweyo kwindawo yokugcina. Ukuhamba komsebenzi {distBuild} kuyakha kwakhona emva kokudityaniswa ngakunye ukuya kwi-{mainBranch} ukuba kuya kukhukuliswa, kwaye {distCheck} ziibhloko ii-PRs eziza kukhupha iziphumo eziphelelwe lixesha.

formats.heading: Kuthekani ngezinye iifomathi zezixhobo?
formats.body: Namhlanje: {resx}, {xliff}, {po}, {json}, {ini}, {restext}. {issueLink} ukuba ufuna enye - ujongano lwe-parser luncinci (ukwahlula ngezijungqu → imephu → ufake iinguqulelo → nefomathi) kwaye iminikelo yamkelekile.

translations.title: Iinguqulelo
translations.lede: Eli phepha liguqulelwa nguMguquleli weZibonelelo ngokwalo, kuzo zonke iilwimi ezixhaswe yi-Azure AI Translator.
translations.filterPlaceholder: Khangela ngolwimi, ikhowudi okanye igama lomthonyama ...

steps.workflow: Ukutyhala oko kuchukumisayo kukhaba {workflowLink}, ebaleka {thisAction} ngokuchasene nayo.
steps.fanOut: Isenzo siphuma kuyo yonke indawo exhaswa yi-Azure AI Translator (elungiselelwe ngo-{configPath}) kwaye ibhale umntakwabo {messagesLocaleJson} kwithagethi nganye.
steps.pullRequest: Isicelo sokutsala sivulwa ngeenguqulelo ezintsha. Ukuyidibanisa kupapasha kwakhona eli phepha ngamakhadi azalisiwe.

translations.poweredBy: Inikwe amandla nguMguquleli weZixhobo kunye ne-Azure AI Translator.

contributing.title: Igalelo
contributing.lede: Iingxelo zebug, izicelo zeempawu, kunye nezicelo zokutsala zonke zamkelekile. Isenzo sincinci ngokwaneleyo ukuba sibe nobubele kubanikeli bexesha lokuqala.

steps.tests: Bhala iimvavanyo zohambo olujikelezayo kwifomathi yohlalutyo → kwaye ufake iinguqulelo.

coverage.heading: Imida yokugubungela
coverage.body: I-Jest config inyanzelisa ukugubungela okuncinci. Ikhowudi entsha kufuneka igcine iingxelo + imigca engaphezulu kwe-78% kunye nemisebenzi engaphezulu kwe-90%. Yongeza iimvavanyo kunye novavanyo ecaleni kotshintsho lwakho.

docsSite.heading: Indawo yamaxwebhu
docsSite.body: Ifolda {docsDir} yiprojekthi ye-Astro 6 + Tailwind v4. Qhuba {npmInstall} apho kube kanye, ze {npmRunDev} ukujonge phambi koshicilelo lwangaphakathi. I-{pagesWorkflow} workflow ithumela amaxwebhu kumaphepha eGitHub kuwo onke ama-merge.

changelog.title: Utshintsho lwelog
changelog.lede: Isishwankathelo esiphezulu sokukhutshwa. Utshintsho lwe-canonical, olunegunya luhlala CHANGELOG.md kwindawo yokugcina.

releases.v302: {label} Izicelo zabaguquleli ngoku ziqhoboshela {apiVersion} kucingo kuzo zombini {translate} kunye {languages}. I-Azure SDK ihlonipha kuphela ukhetho lwe-api-version yenqanaba lomthengi xa isiqinisekiso sidlulisiwe; isenzo siqinisekisa ngesicelo ngasinye ngeentloko, ke olo khetho lwalahlwa ngokuthe cwaka kwaye izicelo zagqitywa kuhlobo lwe-API olunekhontrakthi {translate} yakhaba umzimba nge-HTTP 400 (ikhowudi yempazamo {code}). Igqibezela ukulungiswa kwaqala kwi-3.0.1.
releases.v301: {label} Umzimba wesicelo se-{translate} ngoku luluhlu olungenanto lwe-JSON lwezinto {textItem} endaweni yento {inputs} esongelweyo, ehambelana nekhontrakthi ye-v3.0 REST. Ngokwayo oku akuzange kubuyisele iinguqulelo — jonga 3.0.2.

items.newInputs: Amagalelo amatsha: {include}, {exclude}, {configPath}, {categoryId}, {apiVersion}, {dryRun}, {failOnError}, kunye namaqhina oMguquleli aphambili {textType}, {profanityAction}, {profanityMarker}, kunye {allowFallback}.
items.sourceLocale: I-locale yomthombo ngoku ikwathunyelwa kuMguquleli njengoko {fromLocale} ke uluhlu lwamagama amafutshane alufumaneki ngokuzenzekelayo.
items.resilience: {label} ukuphinda uzame ngokuzenzekelayo kwiimpendulo ze-HTTP zexeshana ({statusCodes}) ezihlonipha i-Azure's {retryAfter} header - zibuyela umva kwi-jittered exponential backoff xa ingekho. I-Tunable nge-{maxRetries} kunye ne-{retryBackoffMs}. {issue}
items.placeholderProtection: {label} iimpawu ezinje nge-{mustache}, {jsVar}, {indexZero}, {numberFormat}, {printf}, {positionalPrintf} kunye ne-HTML zisongelwe kwii-sentinels ngaphambi kokuguqulelwa kwaye zibuyiselwe emva koko, ke uMguquleli uyayeka ukuphazamisa i18next / Mustache / Handlebars / .NET / printf placeholders. Toggle nge-{protectPlaceholders}; Yandisa {customPlaceholderPatterns}. {issue}
items.perKeyOptOut: {label} {noTranslatePatterns} entsha igalelo liyeka amaqhosha angqamanayo kwisicelo soMguquleli ngokupheleleyo (igcina amaxabiso omthombo wamagama eempazamo, iikhowudi zempazamo, njl.njl.). Ihambelana neepateni ze-glob ngokuchasene nezitshixo zenqanaba le-parser (indlela yamachaphaza ye-JSON, i-RESX {resxName}, i-PO {poMsgid}, iyunithi ye-XLIFF {xliffId}, i-INI / isitshixo se-restext). {issue}
items.tooling: esbuild bundler, ESLint 9 flat config, Prettier, EditorConfig.
items.docsSite: I-Astro + Tailwind v4 docs indawo eneenguqu zokujonga kunye neKhowudi yokuCacisa.
items.docsAccessibility: {label} WCAG 2.1 AA pass. Ii-glyphs ze-logo ziguqulwe zibe ziindlela ukuze zingasaphumeleli ukuchasana nombala ngokuchasene nokumisa kwe-gradient, iqhosha le-{backToTop} elidadayo lisebenzisa i-{inert} ngelixa lifihliwe (endaweni ye-toggle ye-{ariaHidden} eshiye i-tabbable), {formatsAstro} amacandelo angasadibani nee-ID zabo zentloko ezenziwe ngokuzenzekelayo, amakhadi amathathu endawo ngoku atyhila iimpawu ze-{lang} ezisebenzayo ze-BCP-47 ({nya}, {lug}, {run}), iilebheli eziphindwe kabini {documentation} eziphawulekayo zihlukaniswe phakathi kwebar esecaleni kunye ne-footer,  kunye netafile nganye yedatha kwi-{inputs} / {configuration} iinqanawa kunye ne-caption ye-screen-reader.
items.inlineCode: {label} Docs prose {codeElement} ngoku inxibe i-accent yomxholo ofudumeleyo / we-amber - eyahlukileyo kwiphalethi ye→accent esetyenziselwa amakhonkco kunye nezihloko.
items.automation: I-Dependabot auto-merge, i-CodeQL scanning, i-CI matrix.
